steps.title: Set up the rectangle area formula
steps.content: For a rectangle, Area = width × length. We're given that the area $A = w(w+79)$ and the width is $w$. Therefore: $$w(w+79) = w \times \text{length}$$

steps.title: Isolate the length
steps.content: Divide both sides by $w$: $$\text{length} = \frac{w(w+79)}{w} = (w+79)$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.
